landing.organizer: Volunteer Fire Brigade City of Emmerich am Rhein
landing.title: Summer, water, competition:
landing.subtitle: Everything about the tournament at one place.
landing.subtitle_2: Come by and experience exciting games, strong teams, and great atmosphere at the field!
landing.subtitle_3: Löscheinheit Elten looks forward to seeing you!
landing.route_hint: Opens Google Maps and starts navigation to the tournament location.
landing.card_one_text: Stay up to date with fixtures, time slots, and matchups on one central page.
landing.card_two_text: Enjoy fair competition, sporting ambition, and real tournament energy around the pool.
landing.card_three_text: Questions about registration or organization? Reach out directly through the contact page.
landing.program_title: A summer day with competition, community, and good food
landing.program_text: The website borrows the flyer look while keeping every key detail easy to scan on screen: time, place, and the event highlights.

carousel.title: Sponsors
carousel.subtitle: This event is made possible by our sponsors. Thank you for your support!
